missing_completion_contract.required_action: Attempt the controlled contract-repair lane using existing explicit bounded authority evidence; request human authority only when the repair remains unresolved.

missing_authoritative_source.required_action: Create and approve one repository authority record that defines the bounded completion scope and records explicit completed and total counts.

missing_readme_marker.required_action: Review the unsafe README marker structure and authorise one exact marker correction before rerunning the generated README repair lane.

ambiguous_project_type.required_action: Select one authoritative project type or explicitly classify the repository as mixed before any completion contract is generated.

contradictory_evidence.required_action: Reconcile the conflicting authority statements and approve one bounded completed-and-total record; automation must not choose between them.

no_completion_evidence.required_action: Add explicit completed and total counts to one existing authority or status record without deriving them from activity, files or percentages alone.

inactive_repository_candidate.required_action: Decide whether the repository is active, should be archived, or should remain excluded before completion onboarding.
